changes.check: 2C — Ancillary file questionnaireSchema.ts: noted, not scope creep
changes.citation: Prompt scope: 'Update: QuestionnaireForm.tsx'. Implementation also created frontend/app/lib/questionnaireSchema.ts (fetch utility) and frontend/tests/lib/questionnaireSchema.test.ts. Utility is fetch-logic extraction required by change; test satisfies prompt test requirement. No behavioural surface beyond what primary change requires.

content_review: COMPLETE — backend/ssot/questionnaire.json read (59 questions, lines 1-536). SSOT not modified. blood_pressure_reading confirmed at line 126. Route loads SSOT at questionnaire.py:24. No content drift.
behaviour_review: COMPLETE — MIXED correct: fetch wiring = BEHAVIOUR, no CONTENT changes. Intelligence Core unaffected. All 8 renderer types confirmed in RENDERER_EXPLICIT_TYPES. Loading state, explicit error state, no mock fallback confirmed. Two pre-existing non-blocking gaps (conditionalDisplay, alternativeUnit) out of scope. All 6 STOP conditions clear. Submission contract unchanged. Determinism preserved.
